newsBar: BECOME PART OF THE NOMAD COWORKING COMMUNITY IN TREBINJE
newsBarItems: BECOME PART OF THE NOMAD COWORKING COMMUNITY IN TREBINJE
heroSubtitle: A PLACE WHERE IDEAS GROW AND PEOPLE CONNECT.
heroSupportText:
NOMAD is a coworking space in Trebinje designed for freelancers, entrepreneurs, and remote professionals who value focus, calm, and a sense of community.
It's not just a place to work — it's a place to belong.

values.title: CALM & FOCUS
values.description: A workspace free from noise, pressure, and distractions.

values.title: COMFORTABLE ENVIRONMENT
values.description: A warm, natural space designed for long, focused work sessions.

values.title: COMMUNITY
values.description: A place where people connect, collaborate, and grow.

storyParagraphs: Working from home often means compromise. A compromise between focus and comfort, between work and personal life, between productivity and peace.
NOMAD was created to change that. Every detail is designed for focus — light, silence, layout, atmosphere. A space that helps you stay clear, organized, and fully present in your work.
No distractions. No improvisation. No lost rhythm.
Because sometimes the problem isn't the work — it's the space you work in.
featuresTitle: A SPACE THAT RESPECTS YOUR WORK

features.title: WIFI — HIGH-SPEED INTERNET
features.description: A stable and reliable connection designed for professional work and video calls.

features.title: WORKSTATIONS WITH PRIVATE LOCKERS
features.description: A dedicated workstation with a private, lockable locker for security and organisation.

features.title: PRIVATE ZOOM ROOM
features.description: A quiet, dedicated space for online meetings and calls without interruptions.

features.title: CONFERENCE TABLE
features.description: A space designed for meetings, presentations, and team collaboration in a calm, professional setting.

features.title: OFFICE ESSENTIALS
features.description: All basic office supplies available without complications.

features.title: COFFEE & HOT DRINKS
features.description: Coffee and hot drinks for the small rituals that make work more enjoyable.

features.title: PRIVATE PARKING
features.description: Easy access and hassle-free parking in the immediate vicinity.

features.title: FLEXIBLE WORKING HOURS
features.description: Open including weekends, for work on your own schedule.

features.title: WORKING IN NATURE
features.description:
Views of the river, natural light, and the option to work outdoors create an environment that feels calm, yet inspiring.
Here, work doesn’t mean being confined between four walls — it means having the freedom to shift your perspective, take a breath, and continue with renewed energy.

At NOMAD, working in nature isn’t an extra — it’s part of the experience.

immersiveDescription:
NOMAD is designed as a balance of different zones, each tailored to a unique way of working.

Every space has its own purpose, yet all share the same sense of calm, elegance, and focus.
openSpaceDescription:
An open workspace designed for daily, focused work.

The space is airy, calm, and carefully organized to support concentration without the feeling of crowding.

Ideal for individual work, long sessions, and a stable work rhythm.

memberships.title: NOMAD MEMBER
memberships.description: The most convenient way to make NOMAD part of your daily routine, available during daytime hours from 07:00 to 16:30.
items: High-speed, reliable internet
A dedicated workstation with a private, lockable locker
Access to a private zoom room for meetings and calls
Use of a conference table for up to 4 people
Office essentials
Coffee and hot drinks
Private parking
A natural work setting with river views and the option to work outdoors

memberships.title: NOMAD DAY
memberships.description: A perfect choice for occasional work or getting to know the space, available during daytime hours from 07:00 to 16:30.
items: High-speed, reliable internet
A dedicated workstation with a private, lockable locker
Access to a private zoom room for meetings and calls
Use of a conference table for up to 4 people
Office essentials
Coffee and hot drinks
Private parking

memberships.title: NOMAD TEAM
memberships.description: An ideal choice for meetings, workshops, presentations, and team collaboration, available during evening hours from 17:00 to 22:00.
items: High-speed, reliable internet
Use of a conference table for up to 14 people
Access to an interactive display
Access to a private zoom room for meetings and calls
Office essentials
Coffee and hot drinks
Private parking

memberships.title: NOMAD BUSINESS
memberships.description: An ideal solution for companies that need a registered business address, mail handling, and essential business infrastructure — without the need for a permanent office space.
items: A registered business address and company seat for LLC registration
A dedicated mailbox and receipt of business correspondence
Mail management and notifications about incoming documents
Your company name or logo displayed within the NOMAD space
Access to a conference table for meetings and presentations (upon request)
Professional bookkeeping and administrative support

faqs.question: Is a reservation required?
faqs.answer: Yes. A reservation is required for all packages and is made through the online form on the website.

faqs.question: What is the difference between daily access and monthly membership?
faqs.answer: Daily access is for occasional use, while monthly membership is designed for a regular daily work routine and offers better value over time.

faqs.question: What are the working hours?
faqs.answer: Daytime hours run from 07:00 to 16:30, and the team evening slot from 17:00 to 22:00.

faqs.question: Do I have a dedicated workspace?
faqs.answer: Yes. Each package gives you a clearly defined workspace and secure personal storage.

faqs.question: Can I use the space for meetings and presentations?
faqs.answer: Yes. The conference table and dedicated zones are available according to your selected package.

faqs.question: What's included in the price?
faqs.answer: Depending on your package, the price includes internet, a workstation, equipment, drinks, parking, and access to additional areas.

faqs.question: Do you offer solutions for companies?
faqs.answer: Yes. NOMAD Business provides a registered business address, mail handling, and essential infrastructure — without the need for a permanent office.
